data.name: The Portal HQ
data.description: 5,000 sq ft multi-use event venue in Raleigh, NC. Ideal for corporate retreats, private parties, concerts, fashion shows, and more. Up to 200 guests with free on-site parking.

review.reviewBody: Had a great Christmas party there. Food was good so was atmosphere and decor.
The Portal HQ is perfect for anything you need! The staff is friendly, professional, and always ready to assist. A true hidden gem venue in Raleigh!
The Portal is awesome for concert venues! I had such a smooth experience taking photos here. The crowd had enough room to dance and have a great time.

mainEntity.name: Do you have a full liquor license?

acceptedAnswer.text: We have a beer and wine license. For full bar service, you're welcome to bring in a licensed external bar service, which gives you more control over selection and often comes in at a lower cost than a venue-operated bar.

Every booking includes full use of the 5,000 sq ft space, flexible layout configuration, on-site event support, and free on-site parking. Specific inclusions like AV, staging, and bar service vary by package.
Custom Events start at a 3 hour minimum. Our curated packages range from 5 to 8 hours depending on the event type, with the option to add extra hours at a per-hour rate.
Yes, outside caterers are welcome. If you'd prefer we handle it, catering coordination is available as an add-on through our booking process.
Yes. Free on-site parking is included with every booking. No garages, no meters, no headaches for your guests.

mainEntity.name: How far in advance should I book?

acceptedAnswer.text: We recommend booking at least 2-4 weeks in advance, especially for weekend dates. Saturday evenings and holiday weekends tend to go quickly. If you have a specific date in mind, it's always better to lock it in early.

mainEntity.name: Can I see the space before committing?

acceptedAnswer.text: Absolutely. We offer free tours with no commitment required. Visit theportalhq.com/tour.html and we'll show you around and answer any questions in person.
We handle cancellations on a case-by-case basis. If your plans change, reach out to us directly at portalheadquarters@gmail.com and we'll work with you to find a solution.

mainEntity.name: Is the space available for corporate events?

acceptedAnswer.text: Yes, we regularly host corporate retreats, conferences, seminars, product launches, and team events. Our Executive Experience package is designed specifically for corporate clients and includes AV, microphones, and full tech support.
Up to 200 guests for standing and concert-style events. For seated dinners and formal receptions, we comfortably accommodate up to 100 guests.
